summary: Frontend regression for two small Vibify changes: (1) Work section intro copy update to 'Your brand could be next.' and (2) SEO SITE_URL now sourced from REACT_APP_SITE_URL env var. All 5 review checks PASS. No regressions detected.

test_results.work_intro_text: PASS - 'Your brand could be next.' present, 'case study' absent in [data-testid=work-section]
test_results.work_cards_render: PASS - work-card-0..work-card-8 all render with correct img src (/works/work-1.jpg..work-9.jpg). Curl GET on each image returns HTTP 200. (urllib HEAD initially showed 403 — environment-specific header issue, NOT a real bug; curl/browser load fine.)
test_results.work_hover_overlay: PASS - Hovering work-card-0 reveals reach percentage ('+412% reach') via the animated max-h/opacity overlay; client tag (HEADLINE ACT) and campaign name (Black Coffee — Live) are part of the always-visible card label, reach % is the hover-revealed element as per Work.jsx code.
test_results.seo_home: PASS - canonical=https://vibifymarketing.com/, og:url=https://vibifymarketing.com/, og:image=https://vibifymarketing.com/og-image.png, title='Vibify — Marketing & PR Agency That Makes Brands Viral'
test_results.seo_service_proptech: PASS - canonical=https://vibifymarketing.com/services/proptech, title='PropTech Marketing for Real Estate Brands | Vibify'
test_results.seo_about: PASS - canonical=https://vibifymarketing.com/about, title='About Geethika Sai Sunkara — Vibify'
test_results.contact_form_submission: PASS - POST /api/contact returned 200 via ContactDialog (opened via nav-talk-button), [data-testid=contact-success] visible after submit.
test_results.console_errors: PASS - No pageerror events captured during home/services/about/contact flows.

critical_code_review_comments: Seo.jsx fallback chain is sensible: env > window.location.origin > hardcoded 'https://vibifymarketing.com'. CRA inlines REACT_APP_SITE_URL at build time, so prod rendering reliably resolves to absolute https://vibifymarketing.com.

Minor: Work.jsx hover behavior — review note said 'overlay shows only a reach percentage'. In the current implementation client tag + campaign name are visible at all times (translate-y-2 -> 0 on hover) and only the +reach% line animates in on hover. If the intent is to hide name/client until hover, that's a separate change request, not a regression.
seed_data_creation: Submitted one TEST_ contact form entry (name='TEST User', email='test@example.com').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact form lives in ContactDialog opened via nav-talk-button (no /contact route). Use sessionStorage 'vibify_intro_seen'='1' init script to skip 2s preloader. Image HEAD via urllib can return 403 due to ingress headers; use curl or browser GET to verify static assets. REACT_APP_SITE_URL=https://vibifymarketing.com is correctly inlined; canonical/og are absolute as expected.
